description_long: This object represents a human security guard dressed in a formal, dark uniform, standing upright with feet together. The uniform consists of a long-sleeved shirt, matching trousers, and dark shoes, with a fitted silhouette that suggests professionalism and authority. The figure's posture is straight and attentive, indicating alertness and readiness. The overall appearance is clean and standardized, with no visible accessories or equipment such as hats, belts, or radios. The surface of the uniform appears matte and smooth, with a consistent dark coloration throughout. No visible insignia, badges, or distinguishing marks are present on the uniform.
description: A standing security guard in a formal, dark, matte uniform with a straight, attentive posture and no visible accessories or insignia.
description_view_0: Front view of the security guard, showing the full uniform, straight posture, and both legs together.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the guard, with the arm and leg contours visible and no accessories apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, straight legs, and no visible equipment or insignia.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the guard's profile, similar to view 1, with no additional features visible.
attribute_uniform_type: A formal, standardized security guard uniform consisting of a long-sleeved black shirt and matching black trousers, with black shoes and no visible tie, hat, or jacket; the uniform is simple, professional, and unadorned.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with feet together and arms at the sides in an attentive stance.
